case_title: LENDMARK FINANCIAL SERVICES,LLC VS. TRUNG DANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-12-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
